(i) 'ij' ? t. m.cfiT.f.t t. 590(ar), ? 2 ?. 1989 IDU ? ? ? ? ? atfirir t? ? t. m.cfiT.f.t. t. 643(ar), ? 19 3Pffif, 2015 IDU frt;1rr7f4T I MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND IDGHW AYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 3rd September, 2015 G.S.R. 677(E).-Whereas, the draft rules further to amend the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 were published, as required by sub-section (1) of section 212 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 (59 of 1988), vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways number G.S.R. 532(E), dated the 24th July, 201,4, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section (3), Sub- section (i), inviting objections and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected therebybefore the expiry of the period of thirty days from the date on which' copies of the said notification containing the draft rules were made available to the public; · And whereas, copies of the said Gazette notification were made available to the public on the 24th July, 2014; · And whereas, the objections and suggestions received from the public in respect of the said draft rules have been considered by the Central Government; · Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 110 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 (59 of 1988), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989, namely:- I. (I) These rules may be called the Central Motor Vehicles (Fourteenth Amendment) Rules, 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their final publication in the Official Gazette. -- 2 of 4 -- ['IWT II-? 3(i)] 3 2. In the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989,in rule 62, in sub-rule (I), in the proviso, in the Table, after · the item 'Steering gear' and the entries relating thereto, following item and entries shall be inserted at the end, namely:- · "Rear . Under run Protecting Yes No Yes No No As per rule 124 (IA) Device .For N2, N3, T3 and T4 Lateral Side Protection Device Yes No Yes No No As per rule 124 For N2, N3, T3 and T4 (IA).". [No. RT-l 1028/07/2014-MVL] NIRAJ VERMA, Jt. Secy. Not?.-The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-sectjon(i) vide notification number G.S.R. 590(E), dated the 2°d June, 1989 and last amended vide notificationnumber G.S . .R. 643(£) dated ! 9th August, 2015. / Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi- I I 0064 and Published by the Controiier of Pubiications, Delhi-110054. -- 3 of 4 -- -- 4 of 4 --
